branch.branch_summary: Run a runtime-backed v9.2 direction review for External Runtime Production Boundary Candidate, preserving v9.1 Product Value Comprehension as a mandatory release gate.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v9.1 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Prepare v9.2 External Runtime Production Boundary Candidate: define the exact proof, approval, credential, budget, revocation, rollback, monitoring, incident, human go/no-go, and product-value comprehension preconditions required before any controlled provider execution is eligible.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Run a runtime-backed direction review before opening the next implementation task: Run a runtime-backed v9.2 direction review for External Runtime Production Boundary Candidate, preserving v9.1 Product Value Comprehension as a mandatory release gate.
